compiled_state.title: RED test: record-review.sh --attest mode
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Write a failing test file for the --attest flag on record-review.sh. The test creates a synthetic worktree artifacts directory with a valid review-status file (status=passed, valid diff_hash, score, review_hash), then invokes record-review.sh --attest <dir> and asserts on the written output.

### Files to create
- tests/hooks/test-record-review-attest.sh

### Test approach (Given/When/Then)
- Given: a temp worktree artifacts dir containing review-status with status=passed, a valid diff_hash, score=5, and review_hash
- When: record-review.sh --attest <worktree-artifacts-dir> is invoked in a git repo with staged changes
- Then: review-status is written to session artifacts dir with status=passed, current diff hash, source score and review_hash, attest_source=<worktree-id>, and the overlap check is skipped

### Test cases
1. test_attest_writes_passed_status — happy path: source review is passing, output has status=passed
2. test_attest_writes_current_diff_hash — output diff_hash matches current compute-diff-hash.sh
3. test_attest_preserves_source_score — output score matches source review score
4. test_attest_preserves_review_hash — output review_hash matches source review_hash
5. test_attest_includes_attest_source — output includes attest_source=<worktree-id>
6. test_attest_skips_overlap_check — does not require reviewer-findings.json (no overlap validation)
7. test_attest_refuses_missing_source — exits non-zero when source review-status is absent
8. test_attest_refuses_failed_source — exits non-zero when source status is "failed"

### .test-index
Update .test-index with RED marker [test_attest_writes_passed_status] for plugins/dso/hooks/record-review.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/hooks/test-record-review-attest.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-record-review-attest.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 8 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_attest_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-record-review-attest.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker for record-review.sh
  Verify: grep '\[test_attest_writes_passed_status\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Tests fail (RED) against current codebase (--attest not yet implemented)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-record-review-attest.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — All 8 test functions present, tests fail RED (PASSED: 3 FAILED: 9, exit 1). The 3 passes are negative-path tests (refuses_missing_source, refuses_failed_source, attest_source ne checks) that pass because --attest is unknown, producing exit 1 — the correct RED condition since the attest refusal behavior also requires non-zero exit.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All 4 acceptance criteria verified: (1) test file executable, (2) 8 test functions present, (3) .test-index RED marker, (4) tests fail RED with exit 1
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — Files: tests/hooks/test-record-review-attest.sh, .test-index. Tests: RED (8 test functions, correctly failing).
comments.author: Test
